resume.title: Resume
resume.intro: Hello, I'm Gabriel, a passionate Full Stack Developer currently studying Computer Science. With a deep-rooted love for Linux, I consider myself a power user, I love libre and open-source software. My curiosity extends beyond coding, I'm also proficient in image manipulation, And my love for debugging apps and modding Android phones adds to my technical skills.
